name: zamor-manager-server
description: Backend Express + Sequelize pour Zamor Manager

scripts.postinstall: npm run install:browser && cd ../client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check config/database.js && node --check models/index.js && node --check models/User.js && node --check models/SaleReceipt.js && node --check models/ReceiptItem.js && node --check controllers/authController.js && node --check controllers/saleController.js && node --check controllers/reportController.js && node --check controllers/userController.js && node --check routes/authRoutes.js && node --check routes/saleRoutes.js && node --check routes/reportRoutes.js && node --check routes/userRoutes.js && node --check middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check middleware/roleMiddleware.js && node --check middleware/logger.js && node --check middleware/loginRateLimit.js && node --check utils/generateReceiptCode.js && node --check utils/pdfGenerator.js && node --check utils/receiptLogo.js
